embed.alt: A high-energy 15-second commercial-style video featuring a female chef in a spotless luxury kitchen dramatically assembling an absurdly overcomplicated gourmet snack board. Quick cuts of her slicing artisan bread, arranging imported cheeses, stacking dried fruits, placing olives, nuts, and crackers with extreme precision, and adding elegant dips in tiny glass bowls. She uses tweezers to place microgreens, fans out strawberries in perfect spirals, and adds edible flowers like it’s fine art. Final shot: she presents the extravagant board to camera, the music cuts out, and she smiles casually and says, “Anyone can do it.” Title card flashes: “SNACK BOARD MASTERCLASS” in bold luxury typography with glossy food-commercial graphics.
